subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh the truth, and therein lieth that which will guide humanity to the shores of divine oneness and nourish them with its fruits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه ما یبلغ الناس الی شاطی الاحدیه و یرزقهم من ثمرات
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @chastisement and requital, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God
